chemistry_pinned.citation_note: Specific capacities pinned from standard Li-ion materials literature (NMC111 practical ~150-165 mAh/g; graphite ~350-360 mAh/g). To be reconciled with ICSI materials data if/when provided.

selection_policy: No selection made at generation time. Valid candidates span a lab capacity range and will be offered (2-3) to the ICSI fabrication partner; final selection joint, per line constraints.
partner_constraints_status: No ICSI line constraints available as of 2026-06-24. Lab-scale targets and conservative loadings are OUR stated design assumptions, to be reconciled on partner response.

candidates.design_note: smallest coupon, few layers, low loading
